name: xcom-enhanced-gallery
description: Enhanced media viewer and download functionality for X.com

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run validate && npm run deps:graph && vite build --mode production
scripts.build:dev: npm run deps:graph && npm run clean && vite build --mode development
scripts.build:compile: npm run deps:graph && vite build --mode production
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run test
scripts.prebuild: npm run deps:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.deps:graph: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --output-type dot src | dot -T svg > docs/dependency-graph.svg
